CustomField.description: If Billing Call or Webinar Status = Complete, this field shows the number of days between the Billing_Activation_Date_Stamp__c - Billing_Call_or_Webinar_Date__c
CustomField.inlineHelpText: If Billing Call or Webinar Status = Complete, this field shows the number of days between the Billing Call or Webinar Date and the Billing Activation Date Stamp.
CustomField.label: Days Billing Call 1 to Activated Stamp
